title: test
genText:
I. Preparation of Tools  
1. Place tools on the table (see photo)  

II. Assembly Process  
1. Gather all necessary components for assembly.  
2. Follow the schematic provided in the assembly guide.  
3. Secure components using the appropriate fastening methods.  
4. Conduct a visual inspection of the assembly for correctness.  

III. Final Testing  
1. Connect the assembled unit to the testing equipment.  
2. Verify functionality according to the quality standards checklist.  
3. Document any discrepancies found during testing.  
4. Prepare the unit for shipment upon successful testing.
